title: Mother's Day Handmade Gift Guide
excerpt: Scoured Etsy for some fun Mother's Day presents I would want to receive myself (no, that's not really a hint for JC or Jack - wink wink). Instead of waiting until the last minute (although it is less than two…
body:
Scoured Etsy for some fun Mother's Day presents I would want to receive myself (no, that's not really a hint for JC or Jack - wink wink). Instead of waiting until the last minute (although it is less than two weeks away!), I thought it would be fun to do some browsing online. 

Best Mom Ever card | Flower Vase | 14K gold Stacking Rings (the ones I always wear are the smooth finish) | Envelope Clutch | Mama Bird Tee | Quadretti large print | Not pictured is some traveler's notebooks that we had made that we are giving an exclusive first look to SharBearCrafts!
